title: Garden Mile 6ft Frosted Christmas Garland - Winter Wonderland Indoor 25 Warm White LEDs, Pine Cones & Berries - Thick Snowy 180cm Garland Décor for Fireplace & Stairs
features: 6ft Frosted Christmas Garland - This frosted Christmas garland measures a full 6ft in length, providing 180cm of snowy festive décor. Ideal for indoor winter styling along mantels, fireplaces and stair bannisters.

Thick Frosted Pine Garland - Made with dense artificial pine branches, this snow-effect garland features pine cones and berries, giving a realistic winter look with a premium frosted finish that stands out in Christmas displays.

LED Battery Powered Snow Garland - Pre-lit with 25 warm white LEDs, this frosted garland is battery powered by 3x AA batteries (not included) and includes a handy timer function for automatic 6 hour on and 18 hour off illumination.

Winter Wonderland Frosted Décor - The snowy branches and gentle glow create a winter wonderland effect, perfect for indoor white Christmas décor themes. Adds a soft festive ambience to your home without the mess of real snow

Versatile Indoor Snow Garland Display – Flexible in design, this 6ft frosted garland can be shaped and placed along staircases, fireplaces, door frames or used as a snowy table centrepiece for a coordinated festive look.
description: Bring a winter wonderland look to your home with the Garden Mile Frosted Christmas Garland. Measuring a full 6ft, this snowy garland provides 180cm of festive indoor decoration, perfect for creating a frosted Christmas display without the mess of real greenery. The branches are coated with a soft snow-effect finish to give a freshly fallen snow appearance, while pine cones and berries are woven throughout to add realistic seasonal texture. Pre-lit with 25 warm white LED lights, the garland casts a gentle glow across the frosted foliage for a cosy winter ambience. Powered by 3x AA batteries (not included), it can be placed anywhere indoors without needing plug sockets, making it ideal for fireplaces, bannisters and door frames. The built-in timer function keeps the lights on for six hours and then switches them off for eighteen, providing automatic evening illumination throughout the festive season. Designed for use year after year, this artificial frosted garland offers a durable and reusable alternative to real pine. Whether you’re styling a snowy fireplace garland or draping it along your stairs for a frosted banister effect, it adds a polished winter finish to your Christmas décor. Pair it with candles, lanterns or matching frosted accessories to complete your seasonal styling. Safety Warning [GENERAL] Keep away from water, do not leave on unattended, and small parts may pose a choking hazard.
